description: Bowling et al. speed/angle with corrected aim scale and conservative guessed spin/y0. Spin reduced from 0.08 to 0.02, y0 from 0.015 to 0.005.

meta.notes: std[0]=0.0123 is Gaussian-equiv of Student-t(5, scale=0.0095). angle_scale_range is the intended Student-t scale range from Bowling, in radians, and overrides std[1] during sampling. std[2]=0.02 and std[3]=0.005 are conservative guessed spin/y0 noise because Bowling did not specify them.
